explanations.pt-br: A grid de duas colunas: uma para reasoning (amarelo) e outra para resposta (verde).
explanations.en-us: Two-column grid: one for reasoning (yellow) and one for answer (green).

explanations.pt-br: Define o corpo da requisição com chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking e stream: true.
explanations.en-us: Sets the request body with chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking and stream: true.

explanations.pt-br: Consome o stream SSE linha a linha e atualiza os painéis reasoning e answer em tempo real.
explanations.en-us: Consumes the SSE stream line by line and updates reasoning and answer panels in real time.
